title: Changelog
text: Deliverable (integration / run--observe): promoted long-lived add-methodology branch (105 commits / 356 files / +44,473−2,892; master strict ancestor → 0 behind → clean conflict-free merge) master via PR #41 (merge commit 0363ffe3, --merge preserve multi-session TDD history — never squashed). Pre-flight build-equivalent gate (non-e2e clean-regression read) = 2140 pass / 0 fail / 0 err / 0 non-e2e offenders (S49 baseline held); branch protection master. Held merge PR’s first-ever remote CI, triaging red root cause: R-CMD-check passed 5 platforms (macOS, Windows, ubuntu release/devel/oldrel-1) + test-coverage passed → package correctness intact; pkgdown FAIL = real doc-site-deploy-(docs/methodology+docs/planning tracked inside pkgdown’s docs/ output dir → clean_site() refuses clean non-pkgdown docs/) → logged issue #42; lint FAIL = known style debt (#30); codecov/patch+project FAIL = external/advisory thresholds. Owner decision (AskUserQuestion): “merge now, fix pkgdown later”. renv lib-path resolution RENV_CONFIG_AUTOLOADER_ENABLED=false (R CMD INSTALL + every AppDriver subprocess booted app); (2) 23--one-process Chrome flake — 8e-7 per-module fresh-process grouping produced ZERO transient errors (first environmental confirmation; per-group isolation contains future transient). Closed issue #40 (“Strengthen shinytest2 E2E assertions”) full validation comment — §8e assertion-strengthening + CI-stability campaign code-complete live-validated master. Follow-ups logged (done session): #42 (relocate methodology docs pkgdown’s docs/), #30 (lintr cleanup) — independent package correctness.

what: 2026-06-10 — Phase 8e-7 (CI per-module fresh-process grouping): run the 23-file shinytest2 E2E tier in 13 per-module groups, each in a fresh R process, to defang the 23-in-one-process Chrome flake (issue #40, Session 50)
title: Changelog
text: Deliverable (CI config / run--observe): plan slice 8e-7 (docs/planning/phase8e-assertion-strengthening-subplan.md §8/§8e-7 — FINAL §8e slice) — replaced single test_dir(filter = "^(app|e2e)-", stop_on_failure = TRUE) run step .github/workflows/shinytest2.yaml single job loops 13 per-module group regexes, run fresh Rscript process, one process accumulates 23 Chrome/AppDriver instances (S34 “process-count dragon”: ~1 transient error / 5 full-tier single-process runs). Caps process ≤3 files. Per group: test_dir(filter = rx, stop_on_failure = FALSE) → passed/failed/skipped/error report → fail/error > 0 ⇒ quit(status = 1) (checked FIRST, real failure never mislabeled) → passed == 0 ⇒ stop() per-group silent-skip guard (stronger old whole-run guard; zero-match regex caught separately test_dir’s “test files found” abort). bash loop runs groups (full signal, one flake doesn’t skip rest) reds job group failed — preserving stop_on_failure semantics + job env / Chrome provisioning / R CMD INSTALL / timeout-minutes: 30 / removed continue--error (R6). Owner-gated topology (AskUserQuestion): single-job loop chosen 13-leg strategy.matrix (cheapest, plan-faithful, root-cause-sufficient — matrix’s 13× setup wasn’t worth nightly job). TDD = run--observe (CI config; RED→GREEN, plan §6), gated PRE-RED→run--observe. Verified locally: COMMITTED 13-regex partition selects EXACTLY 23 ^(app|e2e)- files — union == tier, overlap / gap / stray — full 182-file dir (replicating testthat’s stripped-name match, Learning #33c); YAML parses (yaml.safe_load); run-step bash -n clean; Rscript -e '...' block single-quote-free; run-step logic smoked throwaway dir (pass→exit 0, fail→exit 1, skip / nomatch → nonzero) — four branches. ⚠ Live-runner-(FM #24’s cousin): flake mitigation environmental — partition / guard / exit logic proven locally, 23--one-process flake can confirmed gone first live GitHub run (requires workflow master). Ships UNVALIDATED locally; claimed fixed live run shows . Pushing add-methodology → master remains SEPARATE deliverable. Scope: CI-config (R/ / tests/ change → test suite byte-identical). CHANGELOG-(package/source change).

Added upfront guard (alongside NEW-45 period guard) rejects duplicate ids clear, actionable message (“animal IDs must unique; duplicated id(s): …”), consistent kinship() (“id values must unique”) removeDuplicates(). unique-id invariant domain rule. Reachability direct-geneDrop()-call : canonical qcStudbook → reportGV → geneDrop path doubly masked — removeDuplicates() (qcStudbook) kinship()’s unique-id guard (called reportGV geneDrop). reportGV change needed. Contract-preserving: today’s behavior already crash, currently-succeeding call changes — diagnostic improves (Learning #8b). Strict TDD (RED→GREEN→REFACTOR). title: nprcgenekeepr
text: nprcgenekeepr (Version 1.0.8) R package implementing Genetic Tools Colony Management. Initially conceived developed Shiny web application Oregon National Primate Research Center (ONPRC), enhanced capability Shiny application expose functions use either interactively R scripts. work supported part NIH grants P51 RR13986 Southwest National Primate Research Center P51 OD011092 Oregon National Primate Research Center.

title: nprcgenekeepr
text: Quality Control - Validation studbooks text files, Excel workbooks, LabKey EHR pedigrees. Checks include: Parent record verification Sex validation (male dams, female sires) Duplicate detection Date validation Minimum parent age verification (default 2 years) Pedigree Creation - Building pedigrees animal lists using LabKey EHR integration via Rlabkey package Age-Sex Pyramid Plots - Visual display living animals age sex demographic analysis Genetic Value Analysis Reports - Ranking scheme using: Mean kinship (indicates inter-relatedness colony) Genome uniqueness (indicates presence rare alleles) Animals low mean kinship high genome uniqueness rank higher Breeding Group Formation - Creating potential breeding groups : Avoid mating closely related animals Support optional sex ratio constraints Support harem group configuration Maximize genetic diversity

what: NEW-15 — countKinshipValues.R:131-134 wrong loop index · HIGH · correctness
title: PED + GV Cluster Audit (Session 2)
text: countDiffs <- integer(length(valueDiffs)) (value valueDiffs) { countDiffs[index] <- kCounts[[index]][kValues[[index]] == value] }. vector sized length(valueDiffs) loop iterates valueDiffs, assignment indexes outer loop variable index, per-value position. Every iteration writes slot (last new value lost); index > length(valueDiffs) vector silently grows leading 0/NA. Correct form: (seq_along(valueDiffs)) countDiffs[] <- kCounts[[index]][kValues[[index]] == valueDiffs[]]. test exercises -kValues runs, valueDiffs always empty block (l.127-138) never entered — defect untested. (Independently confirmed author’s read.)

title: nprcgenekeepr — Project-Specific Learnings
text:
patterns recur across Learnings. canonical statement lives , stated ; Learning cites reflexes used first discovered [tag]. [tag] “(discovered #N)” means Learning N entered campaign. [verify-first] (discovered #5/#8a/#9a) — Empirically reproduce ACTUAL failure mode, confirm prescribed fix actually fixes failure, writing RED test. audit’s stated mechanism remedy can wrong: NEW-48 hard CRASH “silent NA” (character vs logical/integer NA indexing differ — m[NA_character_,] errors, m[NA_integer_,] returns silent NA row); NEW-25’s prescribed “terminal else” fixed crash fires FIRST (NA) (NaN/NA comparisons yield NA). Probe PAST precursor warning see terminal behavior (-handlers tryCatch(warning=,error=) hides error follows warning). Don’t theorize — verify empirically. [discriminating-RED] (discovered #15a/#20) — pre-existing test can silently PASS buggy output (-names fixture; coincidental equality; substring collision like grepl("1000") matching max="10000"). Design RED input buggy ≠ correct; key SPECIFIC rendered token (value="10", bare 10 collides min/max/step) right LAYER (UI HTML vs internal reactive vs cleaned studbook — server read may already work testServer input-effect passes HEAD). Probe real data first reachability existing assertions move. pre-existing test passing SILENTLY-corrupted output TELL bug real. [stop-vs-warning] (discovered #6/#8b) — Choose CURRENT baseline, per-mechanism (can differ within one function): silent-success → warning/NA (preserve success contract); already-crash → clear stop (preserve crash-contract, improve message). -repo sibling already enforces invariant supplies message precedent. [reachability] (discovered #5/#6) — Verify reachability per-mechanism full qcStudbook pipeline “fixing”; often MIXED (triggers masked, live) can DOUBLY-masked. Known maskers: addUIds (qcStudbook.R:180 — eliminates partial parentage), addParents (injects founder lines missing parents), convertSexCodes (folds H→U / NA→U), removeDuplicates (qcStudbook.R:277), kinship’s unique-id stop. checkParentAge integrity guard (drops NA-birth rows, checkParentAge.R:91). orphaned @noRd/@export symbol → exhaustive caller-trace (incl. .call/get/match.fun/eval + commented-consumers); side-effect bug → call-graph propagation (internal caller can INSULATE leak). grep inventory can NARROW scope (proving siblings unreachable) WIDEN . [regression-read] (discovered #2/#4) — Authoritative read = .data.frame(testthat::test_dir("tests/testthat", reporter="silent", stop_on_failure=FALSE)) pkgload::load_all(".") (else STALE installed namespace → phantom failures files never touched — see [stale-namespace]) NOT_CRAN=true (skip_on_cran/CI condition; bare test_dir clean read necessary sufficient — devtools::test/CI can ERROR). Prove parser-/behavior-inert via identical(). Delete tautological test control echoed; don’t “fix” . Convert silent-skip class loud failure: res <- .data.frame(test_dir(..., stop_on_failure=TRUE)); (sum(res$passed)==0L) stop(...). browser-E2E R package also: INSTALL package (R CMD INSTALL . — AppDriver subprocess library()s + system.file(package=) resolves ); disable renv autoloader (RENV_CONFIG_AUTOLOADER_ENABLED:'false') deps+install+test land SITE lib subprocess sees (autoloader forces .libPaths()[1] renv’s PRIVATE lib, invisible subprocess starting installed shinytest/ dir project .Rprofile); assert chromote::find_chrome() resolves SINGLE EXISTING path (bare nzchar(NULL) passes vacuously). (8e-1: §2.3/§4 .tab-content > .tab-pane.active + innerText-honors-visibility design WRONG — modules nest tabsetPanels .tab-content NON-UNIQUE [5 containers = 1 top-level navbar + 4 nested module sub-tabsets, active sub-panes “Input Format”/“Plot”/“Rankings”/“Groups”]; querySelector first-match latches onto nested pane nav, mid-fade nested element masked innerText visibility [hidden Home read 1895 chars].) what: Learning 1 — plan-mode output is a draft (FM #19 discovery)
title: nprcgenekeepr — Project-Specific Learnings

Apply: prompt contains multi-phase plan “implement” — recognize planning workstream.

what: Learning 2 — test_local errors vs failed (S3, NEW-15 regression verify)
title: nprcgenekeepr — Project-Specific Learnings
text: testthat::test_local() records test ERRORS separate error column, distinct failed (expectation failures). tally summing failed can read “0 fail” 100+ tests error. repo 154 pre-existing errors (every test-app-*/test-e2e-* file calls -undefined create_test_app(); error, skip, shinytest2+chromote installed). Reflexes: [regression-read]. Apply: whenever verifying “regressions” — count columns; treat pre-existing erroring files baseline; isolate change’s true delta FILE SET, single counter.

Enumerate trigger separately; fix single CHOKE POINT ((anyNA(gen)) warning(...)) every mechanism covered ; prefer warning stop keep return contract — callers unaffected (provably non-spurious — valid acyclic self-contained pedigree always places every id). what: Learning 8 — audit MECHANISM can be wrong; stop-vs-warning by current mode (S7, NEW-48 calcFEFG/calcFE/calcFG)
title: nprcgenekeepr — Project-Specific Learnings
text: () audit’s stated mechanism can wrong — reproduce ACTUAL failure mode first. audit called NEW-48 “silent NA corruption”; empirical repro proved hard CRASH (subscript bounds): m[NA_character_,] ERRORS m[NA_integer_/NA_logical_,] returns silent NA row, calcFEFG coerces ids character (toCharacter), lone-NA parent NA_character_ (3-lens workflow — empirical ‖ static ‖ adversarial-critic — converged CRASH--corruption). (b) stop-vs-warning depends CURRENT failure mode (INVERSE #4/#6): NEW-48’s baseline ALREADY crash, clear stop() contract-PRESERVING (currently-succeeding input now fails — message improves), warning+degrade behavior change. Reachability MIXED: M2 canonical qcStudbook→reportGV pipeline MASKED addUIds (qcStudbook.R:180); M1 direct exported call + M3 trimPedigree(removeUninformative=TRUE, addBackParents=FALSE) via removeUninformativeFounders.R:52-53 REACHABLE. Reflexes: [verify-first][stop-vs-warning][reachability]. Apply: empirically reproduce actual failure mode (character vs logical/integer NA indexing differ); choose stop-vs-warning current behavior.

what: Learning 9 — audit’s prescribed FIX can be wrong; orphaned code (S8, NEW-25 getProportionLow)
title: nprcgenekeepr — Project-Specific Learnings
text: () prescribed FIX can wrong mechanism (extends #8a). audit framed “three-way /else-terminal else,” implying “add terminal else.” NaN > 0.5 NA, (NA) errors “missing value TRUE/FALSE needed” FIRST — fall-— terminal else fixed (~1-min repro caught non-fix). (b) Reachability isn’t always qcStudbook-masking question: getProportionLow @noRd consumer dead/commented makeGeneticDiversityDashboard (NEW-20) — “verify reachability” meant exhaustive caller-trace, fix robustness-hardening orphaned retained helper, empty/edge-input contract pure DOMAIN decision author. COROLLARY: grep unique-named symbol settles reachability, “already verified” — spin heavier 3-lens reachability workflow (empirical ‖ static ‖ adversarial-critic); ceremony (honest reading ultracode’s “unless already verified”). Reflexes: [verify-first][reachability][author-decision][right-sized-orchestration]. Apply: reproduce confirm prescribed remedy actually fixes ; zero-live-caller code, caller-trace + author-decide edge contract.

what: Learning 10 — disprove an unreachable mechanism; both-ways stop/warning (S9, NEW-52 cumulateSimKinships)
title: nprcgenekeepr — Project-Specific Learnings
text: () audit’s mechanism can UNREACHABLE function’s VALUE DOMAIN — strict TDD response DISPROVE fix . M1 (n=1 → 0/0=NaN) reproduced, M2 (“near-constant cells → tiny-negative root → sqrt NaN”) — kinship() returns dyadic rationals (sums powers ½), exact IEEE-754, constant-across-sims cells cancel exactly 0 (probe: 0 negative numerators, 117 exactly-0, 0 NaN n=10/100), unstable expression reachable cumulateSimKinships, non-dyadic data can’t reach . failing test can written → code; pmax(num,0) clamp speculative, untestable defensive code. (b) stop-vs-warning can apply WAYS ONE function: n=1 currently succeeds silently (returns valid mean/min/max + NaN sd) → NA+warning preserves success (NEW-40 side); n=0 already crashes (uninitialized minKinship) → clear stop preserves crash-contract (NEW-48 side) — function, opposite baselines, opposite remedies. COROLLARY: .na(NaN) TRUE — RED test must assert expect_false((.nan(x))), (.na(x)) (passes ). Reachability grep-settled: cumulateSimKinships @exported public orphan (zero live callers) → workflow (Learning #9 corollary). Reflexes: [verify-first][stop-vs-warning][mutation-check][reachability]. Apply: reproduce claimed mechanism; disprove + skip unreachable one; pick stop-vs-warning per-mechanism; use .nan tests.

title: nprcgenekeepr — Project-Specific Learnings

Procedure: clone canonical → diff separate real customization staleness → extract customizations CLAUDE.md → bin/sync . --source=local --force → confirm bin/status = current. Docs docs/methodology/ --edit reference copies (refresh overwrite). dashboard scores CHANGELOG.md (NEWS.md) changelog; NEWS.md remains CRAN-facing release notes. Last synced f32d780 (S10, 2026-05-31). Apply: whenever updating methodology editing synced file — relocate customizations CLAUDE.md, keep synced files canonical, re-run bin/status = current. Don’t answer methodology-governed questions general convention — consult project’s source truth (synced files + methodology_dashboard.py).

title: nprcgenekeepr — Project-Specific Learnings
text: () NEW bug class — “side-effect---caller” — audit -claims HARM, just mechanism (extends #8a/#9a/#10a “audit-claim-wrong” lineage). audit said makeSimPed “overwrites sire/dam” createSimKinships “adds population column place”; empirically false. leak -reference CLASS flip data.frame→data.table (setDT, mutates attributes place); content preserved post-setDT ped$col[…]<-v triggers $<-.data.table’s shallow-copy--rebind (decoupling local ped column write). Realized harm = [-semantics divergence CALLER’s later code (df[1]=column vs dt[1]=ROW; df[,"x"]=vector vs dt[,"x"]=1-col table). (b) Reachability side-effect bug CALL-GRAPH-propagation question, qcStudbook-masker (NEW-37/40/48) value-domain (NEW-52) question: cumulateSimKinships copies via line-52 ped$population<-… sim loop, leak — exposure direct calls three @exported fns. Fix: setDT(ped) → ped <- data.table::.data.table(ped) (copies inputs, byte-identical output — probed; minimal swap suffices $<- never leaks new column caller either — unconditional copy() needed). Grep FULL reference-mutation inventory (setDT/setDF/:=/set(/setattr/setkey) — handoff named 2 sites, audit named makeSimPed+createSimKinships, real cluster 3 (fix--instances, workstream Q4). RED-assert caller’s object UNCHANGED (class(ped) stays "data.frame") immutable snapshot. Mechanism+reachability deterministic-probe--grep-settled → workflow (3rd consecutive). Reflexes: [verify-first][reachability][idiom-inventory][identical-proof]. Apply: separate real leak (often just class/attr flip) claimed corruption; trace whether internal callers insulate ; fix .data.table; RED-assert caller-unchanged.

what: Learning 14 — actual crash + crash SITE differ; doubly-masked; sibling precedent (S14, NEW-46 geneDrop duplicate ids)
title: nprcgenekeepr — Project-Specific Learnings
text: () audit’s “silent wrong values” hard CRASH (3rd NEW-48/NEW-25) crash SITE differed: audit said “parent lookup rowname (geneDrop.R:82-104),” crashes rownames(ped) <- ids (geneDrop.R:97) base-R’s "duplicate 'row.names' allowed" — lookup. title: nprcgenekeepr — Project-Specific Learnings
text: Planned Phase 8 conversion (enable shinytest2 E2E harness) → docs/planning/phase8-e2e-harness-subplan.md. Re-derive symbol inventory grep — never trust prior plan’s count. (b) TEST-HELPER inventory, key CALL FORM (arity + named args), just symbol presence ([idiom-inventory] applied helpers): navigate_to_tab 109 three-arg vs 27 two-arg calls → MUST navigate_to_tab(app, label, fallback=NULL) (2-arg signature errors “unused argument” 109 sites); create_app_driver gets height/width 2 sites → MUST forward ...; E2E_TIMEOUT error-states.R:232 TOP-LEVEL (hard error) L46/boundary-conditions.R:44 tryCatch-swallowed. bare symbol-existence grep (parent’s method) misses three. (c) HIDDEN-DOM: navbarPage renders tabs’ static UI DOM boot (verified .character(appUI()) = 85,106 chars containing every tab’s keywords), suite’s dominant grepl(kw, "body") pattern PASSES TRIVIALLY boot → “harness runs green” ≠ “validates behavior.” planning fork therefore TWO deliverables: make-executable (helpers + CI; issue #39) vs make-validate (rewrite ~41 expect_true(TRUE) tautologies + wrong-tab-nav bug: summary-statistics-module navigates “Genetic Value Analysis” 7/8 tests yet passes). Surfaced owner ([author-decision]); owner scoped #39 executable-, filed validate (“8e”) separate issue. -sell “green.” (d) “one session” parent phase can multi-session MINI-CAMPAIGN inventoried — planning output realistic risk-ordered session map (8a helpers browser-free RED→GREEN / 8b boot-smoke + CI 🐉 first browser run / 8c 15 shallow files / 8d 5 interaction+menu files → close #39), 159 tests assigned. DEFER inert work: input→dataInput namespace mismatch real polling helpers NEVER CALLED (verified) → 8e, 8a; fixing early churn observable effect (module-side signaling already uses session$ns, live app correct). (e) [completeness-workflow] plan (discovery fan-→ adversarial completeness-critic): census 23 files → critic returned 16 findings (4 HIGH single-pass synthesis dropped — 3 extra helpers, constant, arity, ...-forwarding) → re-verify firsthand (greps/sed) — critic CONFIRMS, trusted (#21c). [right-sized-orchestration]: one read-workflow (7 agents), third pass. Reflexes: [verify-first][completeness-workflow][author-decision][idiom-inventory][right-sized-orchestration]. what: Learning 31 — first sub-phase EXECUTION; the approved plan’s §4 pseudo-code was a verify-first target (duplicate-arg splice); browser-free TDD via fake AppDriver stubs (S31, Phase 8a / issue #39)
title: nprcgenekeepr — Project-Specific Learnings
text: Implemented Phase 8a conversion: define 6 shinytest2 E2E driver helpers + E2E_TIMEOUT tests/testthat/helper-shinytest2.R (browser-free RED→GREEN, strict TDD RESUMED two planning sessions #21/#30). () APPROVED plan’s §4 helper pseudo-code [verify-first] target — implementing VERBATIM ships latent bug (extends Learning #30’s “parent plan’s count stale” PLANNING EXECUTION). §4 create_app_driver(app_dir, name, ...) body hardcodes height=800, width=1200 splices ...; 2 boundary-conditions.R sites pass height=/width= NAMED args make AppDriver$new(... height=800 ... height=600 ...) → R error “formal argument ‘height’ matched multiple actual arguments” (verified introspection: formals(shinytest2::AppDriver$public_methods$initialize) EXPLICIT height/width — absorbed AppDriver’s ...). Fix = expose named formals (app_dir, name, height=800, width=1200, ...) caller’s named arg binds ; ... still forwards args (e.g. seed). Surfaced one-line deviation--§4 PRE-RED→RED gate ([author-decision]); FULFILLS plan’s stated intent (“height/width override defaults”), deviates . (b) Audit fix-/wire-helper’s signature CALL FORM (arity + named-vs-positional) baking ([idiom-inventory] applied EXECUTION, #30 lesson): firsthand greps re-derived every call form — create_app_driver 144 two-arg + 2 named-height/width; navigate_to_tab 109 three-arg (POSITIONAL fallback) + 28 two-arg (named 3rd arg, 4-arg); get_html_safe 153× (app,"body"); click_element_safe/navigate_to_menu_item/get_values_safe 5/4/3 sites; return-value consumption (success <- ×129 navigate_to_tab → must return logical; body <- ...; grepl(kw, body) → must return “” error). (c) [right-sized-orchestration] HONESTY workflow failure: launched read-7-agent call-site-audit workflow confirm signatures; FAILED framework hiccup (one subagent never emitted StructuredOutput 2 nudges → bare agent() critic call threw, failing run). Rather re-run, call-form audit firsthand grep (deterministic, grep-settled) — CAUGHT () duplicate-arg bug. verification workflow dies framework mechanics underlying check deterministic grep, hand — don’t fight framework; workflow’s INTENT (catch signature bugs) met manual fallback. (d) BROWSER-FREE TDD browser helpers via FAKE APPDRIVER STUBS: plain list() functions stands R6 AppDriver (app$method(args) resolves $ list calls element). Three stubs discriminate contracts: throwing (every method stop()s → proves *_safe helpers return ""/list()/FALSE navigate_to_tab→FALSE), recording-ok (set_inputs stores env → get_value reflects → navigate_to_tab read-back TRUE), silent--op (get_value never reflects set tab → navigate_to_tab FALSE — proves read-back DISCRIMINATES silent failed navigation, sub-plan finding 15; [discriminating-RED]). create_app_driver’s body inherently needs Chrome → covered existence+formals 8a (real construction 8b); stated browser-deferred limit, FM #24 (helper test infra, app runtime). (e) Phase 3E (runtime APP smoke) N/— 8a changes running-app behavior; helpers live test tree (helper-shinytest2.R, auto-sourced testthat), test SUITE runtime + verification (distinct every prior modular slice S22–S29, changed appServer/app needed runModularApp() smoke). tests/ .lintr-excluded (.lintr:35 "tests") → lint-exempt (direct lint = “lints found”); document() zero man/+NAMESPACE delta (tests/ touched, R/ roxygen); test-infra → CHANGELOG , NEWS. new file test_helper_shinytest2.R (underscore → default suite, browser-free, always-runs like test_create_test_app.R) added 14 test_that / 32 assertions; full non-e2e suite 0 failed/0 error, 2154 passed (+32). Reflexes: [verify-first][idiom-inventory][discriminating-RED][right-sized-orchestration][regression-read][refactor-][document-zero-delta][lint-net-zero][author-decision]. Apply: sub-phase EXECUTION approved plan — treat plan’s helper pseudo-code [verify-first] target (re-audit every call form arity/named-vs-positional baking signature; verbatim splice defaults + ... duplicate-crashes named overrides); confirmation workflow dies framework mechanics check deterministic grep, finish hand; TDD browser helpers browser-free via fake-AppDriver list() stubs (throwing / recording / silent--op) discriminate error + success + read-back contracts; Phase 3E N/deliverable lives test tree (say ) — suite runtime.

what: Learning 32 — first CONFIG-ONLY sub-phase (CI infra, no RED→GREEN); the silent-skip CI blocker the adversarial review caught (S32, Phase 8b / issue #39)
title: nprcgenekeepr — Project-Specific Learnings
text: Implemented Phase 8b conversion: first-ever real browser run modular app (3 boot-smoke files green opt-) + CI rewire .github/workflows/shinytest2.yaml. () “implementation” sub-phase can CONFIG-— new R unit, RED→GREEN (extends #21a/#18c PLANNING/REFACTOR CI-INFRA). 3 boot-smoke files pre-existing use create_test_app()+AppDriver$new DIRECTLY / testServer (Phase-8a derived helpers), sub-plan §11 says E2E files run/triaged, rewritten → verify-first browser SPIKE runtime verification deliverable change CI YAML. Declare TDD code-phases INAPPLICABLE (config-) gate CLASSIFICATION via AskUserQuestion spike evidence hand — manufacture synthetic RED. spike also settled §8.1 nav spike: app$click('[data-value="Input"]') clicks live bslib navbar (self-skip — app-navigation: ... 3 dots, S). (b) CI-authoring [regression-read] footgun ([ci-suite-parity], discovered ): set NPRC_RUN_E2E CI env DROPPED NOT_CRAN — non-interactive Rscript {0} runner testthat::on_cran() (NOT_CRAN=='' !interactive()) TRUE → 3 files’ skip_on_cran() fires → every test SILENTLY SKIPS → stop_on_failure blind skips → scheduled job goes GREEN running nothing. glossary [regression-read] names exact footgun, sub-plan’s verify command carried NOT_CRAN, §7 CI spec OMITTED propagated gap. Reproduced firsthand (NOT_CRAN unset, non-interactive → nb:4 skipped:4 failed:0; local pass held set NOT_CRAN=true). Fix = NOT_CRAN:'true' job env + positive (sum(res$passed)==0L) stop() guard silent-skip class fails loud. (c) Non-obvious browser-E2E CI requirements parent §7 omitted: must INSTALL package (R CMD INSTALL . setup-r-dependencies — inst/shinytest/app.R library(nprcgenekeepr), create_test_app() uses system.file("shinytest", package=); pure-R → fast, src/); renv autoloader makes R CMD INSTALL target renv’s PRIVATE lib AppDriver subprocess (starts installed shinytest/ dir, project .Rprofile) can’t see → RENV_CONFIG_AUTOLOADER_ENABLED:'false' install SITE lib; find_chrome() assert must check single EXISTING path (nzchar(NULL) passes vacuously); browser-actions/setup-chrome@v2 chrome-path → CHROMOTE_CHROME via $GITHUB_ENV; chromote auto-adds ---sandbox CI set (manual flag ubuntu 24.04). (d) adversarial review EARNED KEEP + re-verified firsthand ([completeness-workflow]/[right-sized-orchestration]: workflow CONFIRMS, verify): read-5-agent workflow (4 lenses [gh-actions ‖ chromote-chrome ‖ r-pkg-install ‖ conformance] + completeness-critic) caught HIGH NOT_CRAN blocker (2 lenses), renv-lib-path omission (critic), find_chrome vacuity — reproduced blocker firsthand confirmed critic’s 2 flagged false-positives (R CMD INSTALL build vignettes; find_chrome-NULL path unreachable since CHROMOTE_CHROME set first), rather trusting agents. Grounded design researched current best practice (setup-chrome@v2 latest = v2; ubuntu-latest ships Chrome; chromote CI defaults) validated EXACT run-step + Chrome-assert R locally. (e) Static-CI verification HONESTY (FM #24): live GitHub run DEFERRED (owner chose static+adversarial; branch add-methodology remote → live run creates remote feature branch + outward CI). Verify statically (YAML parse + adversarial review + exact run-step R validated locally green = 37/0/0/0) flag ONE thing statically verifiable — renv lib-path / AppDriver-subprocess interaction — #1 live-run watch item; don’t treat static-clean runtime-clean. R/test code changed → document() N/(roxygen), tests/+.github lint-exempt, full non-e2e suite 0 failed/0 error (5 pre-existing modPyramid warnings, unchanged S31 baseline); CI infra → CHANGELOG , NEWS. Reflexes: [verify-first][ci-suite-parity][regression-read][completeness-workflow][right-sized-orchestration][author-decision][refactor-][phase-3E-smoke][news-vs-changelog]. Apply: CONFIG/CI-infra sub-phase — run verify-first spike settle whether RED→GREEN (often none → declare config-, gate classification via AskUserQuestion, synthetic RED); authoring CI RUNS suite, replicate local verify env (NOT_CRAN+opt-var) guard silent-skip class (sum(passed)>0); browser-E2E CI also install package + disable renv autoloader + assert find_chrome() resolves existing path; verify YAML statically + adversarial-review--re-verify-firsthand, flag -statically-verifiable bits explicit live-run watch items.

title: nprcgenekeepr — Project-Specific Learnings

Ultracode session (keyword, budget directive, confirming system-reminder), standing “author workflow default” apply; S31/S32 ran workflows ultracode real verification surface, whereas one-line filter broaden validated end--end locally honestly “already verified” → ran workflow SAID . Declining workflow reflex running one (#32 ran 5-agent review 6-edit rewrite; #33 declined 1-line change) — discipline matching orchestration surface, always-orchestrating. Narrowed positive 8b+8c include-list PROVED firsthand selects EXACTLY 18 files / excludes EXACTLY 5 8d, replicating testthat’s stripped-name match R (sub("[.][rR]$","",sub("^test[-_]?","",files)) grepl(filt, stripped)) — trust regex eye. re-ran EXACT run-step expression (res<-.data.frame(test_dir(filter=…, stop_on_failure=TRUE)) + sum(passed)==0 guard) SINGLE process → 18 files / passed=140 / 0/0/0, exit 0 — simultaneously discharges §5(8c) AppDriver-process-count dragon (15+ files × drivers one test_dir; flaky timeout / resource exhaustion). single-process run-step validation Phase-3E analog CI-config change (suite runtime). (d) “GREEN” navbarPage hidden-DOM suite (§2.3) means harness-EXECUTABLE, behavior-VALIDATED — confirmed firsthand two masked defects still pass: pyramid’s navigate_to_tab(app,"Age-Sex Pyramid","Pyramid") 3rd arg ignored fallback (navigates TOP-LEVEL tab; modPyramid’s “Plot”/“Statistics” sub-tabs never targeted, yet grepl-body passes), summary-statistics-module navigates WRONG tab (“Genetic Value Analysis”) 7/8 tests still passes (§2.4). 6 nav labels exactly match real navbar titles (appUI.R:24-204) navigation genuinely occurs (read-back TRUE) — even silent -op pass via whole-page body. 8e items, 8c blockers (don’t fix). (e) Live GitHub run DEFERRED (branch remote, posture S32) — broadening filter change S32’s #1 live-run watch item (renv-lib-path / AppDriver-subprocess interaction risk category whether CI runs 3 18 files). R/test code changed → document() N/, tests/+.github lint-exempt, NEWS (CI infra → CHANGELOG ). [macos-dupe-scan]: * 2.* hits .Rproj.user/ RStudio session state (gitignored), source-tree R/foo 2.R/test_foo 2.R class — git status --porcelain '*2.*' empty, document()/test_dir corruption risk absent. Reflexes: [verify-first][right-sized-orchestration][author-decision][regression-read][phase-3E-smoke][refactor-][news-vs-changelog][macos-dupe-scan]. what: Learning 34 — third CONFIG/run-and-observe sub-phase; the spike PREVENTED helper work; a single validation run MASKED a process-count flake the ultracode review caught; close #39 + document (S34, Phase 8d / issue #39)
title: nprcgenekeepr — Project-Specific Learnings
text: Implemented Phase 8d conversion (FINAL #39 sub-phase): 5 interaction/menu E2E files green opt-+ broaden CI run-step filter full ^(app|e2e)- tier (23 files) + close #39 + file 8e (#40). () config/run--observe pattern repeats, 8d REAL spike (§8.2 navbarMenu) meant helper work — [verify-first] PREVENTED (spike can SHRINK scope, just de-risk): set_inputs(mainNavbar="Settings"/""/"Help") → get_value(input="mainNavbar") reads child label back TRUE 3 (navbarMenu children tab inputs just like top-level tabs), provisional navigate_to_menu_item delegate--navigate_to_tab body already FINAL — DOM dropdown-open+click, RED→GREEN. Running spike classifying turned handoff’s “MEDIUM-HIGH 🐉, may need real helper” config/run--observe; classify via AskUserQuestion 53/53 evidence hand (synthetic RED). code touch: finalize docstring (body byte-identical) + CI filter. (b) [flake-aware-validation] — headline lesson, direct CORRECTION Learning #33’s claim single-process run “discharges AppDriver-process-count dragon”: 18 files didn’t bite, broadening 23 one process SURFACED . SINGLE green full-tier run (193/0/0/0) proved nothing stability — “broaden + run ” (S33 handoff’s phrasing) exactly HIDES intermittent flake. ultracode 4-lens review caught (run #1 = 191/0/0/1 error workflow-integration.R “maintains state”; isolated 8/8/8) — review’s 4 concurrent agents pressuring Chrome trigger (contention-sensitivity). [completeness-workflow]: review CONFIRMS, verify — REPRODUCED firsthand (2 fresh dedicated runs clean → low-rate ~1/5, contention-driven) rather trusting agent panicking. (c) flake found mid-close SCOPE FORK, thing paper ([author-decision]): stop_on_failure=TRUE even low-rate flake reds scheduled job, brought NEW-information----original-gate owner AskUserQuestion — close #39 + document (chosen) vs harden-now (per-§5(8c) “run grouped” fresh processes) vs keep-narrower. Hardening can validated live GitHub runner (flake environmental + branch isn’t remote) DEFERRED #40, shipped unvalidated (shipping unvalidatable CI complexity FM-#24-adjacent risk). (d) [right-sized-orchestration] ultracode = run review — EXACT inverse #33’s honest decline: #33 ultracode + 1-line change → workflow; #34 ultracode + consequential DECISION surface (close long-lived tracking issue? #40 complete? diff minimal?) even though CODE surface trivial (comment + 1-line filter). panel earned keep: Lens-1/3 -confirm (diff comment-+ minimal; #40 captures every §2.4/§2.5/§6 item + new navbarMenu false-positive); Lens-4 caught real .DS_Store BLOCKER → commit EXPLICIT git add 2 intended files (never -; pre-existing macOS binary must ride along — [macos-dupe-scan]’s commit-hygiene sibling); Lens-2 caught flake. Match orchestration DECISION surface, just code surface. (e) Honesty nuances: spike resolved “input VALUE reaches navbarMenu child” — “navigation works”; visible pane truly switch (navbar “” highlights; grepl(body) passes via §2.3 hidden-DOM) → §8.3 false-positive, deferred 8e/#40 (overstate spike). #39 closed owner’s ACTUAL scope (§1.1 “executable + CI green opt-” = LOCAL validation + wired CI); TWO live-run watch items now ride first master run (renv lib-path + flake). Diff comment-+ CI → document() N/, tests/+.github lint-exempt, * 2.* source dupes (.Rproj.user/, gitignored); non-e2e regression 0 failed/0 error (2159 passed, 156 e2e-skipped, 5 pre-existing modPyramid warnings); test-infra/CI → CHANGELOG , NEWS. Reflexes: [verify-first][flake-aware-validation][completeness-workflow][right-sized-orchestration][author-decision][regression-read][refactor-][ci-suite-parity][phase-3E-smoke][macos-dupe-scan][news-vs-changelog]. Apply: final config/run--observe sub-phase real spike — run spike FIRST ([verify-first]); can SHRINK scope (navbarMenu set_inputs read-back works → helper change, RED→GREEN) → classify config-via AskUserQuestion. NEVER trust single green run process-count-/timing-sensitive browser tier ([flake-aware-validation]) — validate N times let adversarial review’s concurrency surface flake, reproduce firsthand characterize rate+trigger, bring discovered flake owner scope decision (document + defer hardening follow-can live-validated, vs harden now) rather silently shipping known-flaky stop_on_failure CI. Run review ultracode DECISION surface consequential even CODE surface trivial (also catches .DS_Store-class commit-hygiene BLOCKER → explicit git add).

title: nprcgenekeepr — Project-Specific Learnings
text: FINAL conversion phase: runGeneKeepR() → lifecycle::deprecate_soft() alias launching runModularApp(port=6013L, launch.browser=TRUE); deleted inst/application/ (17 files) + orphans getMinParentAge/getLogo/shouldShowErrorTab/modMinimalTest; closed #27. (b) DELETION NAMESPACE FALLOUT — inventory’s blind spot ([deletion-namespace-fallout]): getMinParentAge.R @noRd, 0-caller orphan, carried package’s #' @import shiny; deleting silently dropped import(shiny) NAMESPACE (leaving partial importFrom list) → modular UI died find function "h5". Neither §10 sweep flagged (reasoned CALLERS, file’s roxygen EMITS); REGRESSION RUN caught . Fix: relocate @import shiny R/nprcgenekeepr-package.R; re-document(); re-verify. (c) RED alias without launching server ([discriminating-RED][testServer-mechanics]): testthat::local_mocked_bindings runModularApp (pkg) runApp (.package="shiny") → test runs clean HEAD (returns monolith sentinel, deprecation) post-impl (modular sentinel + deprecation); lifecycle::expect_deprecated() forces verbosity; system.file("application", package=…)=="" clean RUNTIME RED “monolith longer ships” (split test_monolith_removed.R PAIRED deletion commit every commit stays green). 3 commits: reversible code → standalone deletion → docs (§15 single-revert). (d) full devtools::check() STRICTLY STRONGER gate [regression-read] — caught PRE-EXISTING, unrelated defect prior sessions’ regression-read never surfaced: a2interactive.Rmd’s error-list table hardcoded 9 descriptions getEmptyErrorLst() returns 10 (NEW-45 invalidIdChars field), failing vignette build (data.frame(): 10 vs 9). surfaced prior sessions used regression-read gate never ran full check(). Owner-gated fixing fix: commit (bundled — scope discipline / FM #8). Final check() = 0 errors / 0 warnings; pre-existing NOTEs (non-standard top-level dev files; stale spelling.Rout.save baseline ~60 domain words). (e) a3manual/a2interactive .md/.html/.R STALE--DESIGN release artifacts (dated Jan 20, pre-Phases-1–8) — force-reknit (months unrelated regeneration noise + heavy-chunk failure risk); check() builds vignettes SOURCE anyway, source edit matters. TIEBREAKER --one rows PARENT plan’s counts (6/7/13/10). workflow CONFIRMS; firsthand greps + prior docs SETTLE. what: Learning 37 — first EXECUTION slice of 8e; the hard-gate spike FALSIFIED the plan’s load-bearing selector, and the bounded diagnostic that found the fix IS the spike succeeding (S37, Phase 8e-1 / issue #40)
title: nprcgenekeepr — Project-Specific Learnings
text: Implemented slice 8e-1: 4 active-pane helpers (get_active_pane_text/get_active_pane_value/wait_for_active_pane/assert_active_pane) tests/testthat/helper-shinytest2.R (browser-free RED→GREEN) + live-Chrome spike (HARD GATE) + test-e2e-summary-statistics-module.R conversion (8 tautologies/wrong-tab → behavioral active-pane assertions). Strict TDD, gated. () [hard-gate-spike] — load-bearing spike FALSIFIED planned mechanism (R1 fired). plan §2.3/§4 specified .tab-content > .tab-pane.active + innerText-honors-visibility, flagged “confirm live Chrome FIRST, STOP fails.” spike DISCONFIRMED : modules nest tabsetPanels, .tab-content NON-UNIQUE — 5 containers (1 top-level navbar + 4 nested; nested active sub-panes “Input Format”/“Plot”/“Rankings”/“Groups”), querySelector first-match latched onto nested “Input Format” Settings nav (assert_active_pane(Settings)=FALSE, item 4 failed), mid-fade nested element made innerText look like ignored visibility (hidden Home read 1895). spike load-bearing assumption hypothesis test — can FALSIFY, just de-risk. (b) bounded read-DIAGNOSTIC found corrected mechanism spike succeeding (redesign mode-switch). second read-diagnostic spike (conversion code) proved corrected selector — .tab-content inside .tab-pane (!t.closest('.tab-pane')), direct-child .tab-pane.active: structurally resolved (dependence dynamic data-tabsetid=8517), tracked EVERY navigation incl. navbarMenu(“”) “Settings” child, — correctly scoped — innerText honor visibility (hidden Pedigree=0). deviates approved plan’s mechanism (R1), brought owner scope/approach AskUserQuestion ([author-decision]: apply-fix--complete [chosen] vs checkpoint--stop vs literal-stop) rather silently redesigning past gate (SAFEGUARDS / FM #8); confirmed corrected helpers 17/17 live spike. (c) Browser-free unit tests SURVIVE mechanism rewrite fake stubs key JS’s INVARIANTS, exact text (#31 fake-AppDriver-stub idiom extended active-pane helpers). fake_app_pane discriminates inspecting get_js arg data-value vs innerText substring simulates wait_for_js success embedded label == data_value; fake_app_pane_liar (wait succeeds value≠label) proves assert_active_pane’s redundant identical(get_active_pane_value, tab_label) guard. substrings survive selector change (corrected JS still reads getAttribute('data-value')/innerText), 11 new tests / 59 expectations stayed GREEN across fix — unit layer proves CONTRACT (never-throw + pane/content discrimination), live spike proves BROWSER TRUTH. (d) wrong-tab RED→GREEN [mutation-check] proof two directions, spike already captured RED. Tests 2–8 navigated “Genetic Value Analysis” (§2.4/#33d wrong-tab defect — “Summary Statistics” tabPanel, appUI.R:156-159), converted assert_active_pane(app,"Summary Statistics",…) FALSE nav targets GVA (RED — captured live: “assert SS GVA = FALSE”) TRUE nav→“Summary Statistics” (GREEN). post-conversion [mutation-check] (one boot: wrong-tab→FALSE, correct-tab→TRUE) re-proves discrimination test-file level (old expect_true(TRUE) passed ). Assert STATIC UI — export-button labels, h3 “Summary Statistics Plots”, bottom population-genetics guidance HTML statically defines “Founder Equivalents”/“Founder Genome Equivalents”; founder/quartile TABLES + rendered plots data-dependent → deferred 8e-6 (§8e-1 dragon-2 deferral, honored). (e) Phase-3E / scope: deliverable lives test tree (helper-shinytest2.R + test_helper_shinytest2.R + one converted e2e file) → SUITE + live AppDriver spike runtime (#31 “Phase-3E N/; suite runtime” pattern); drive real app (17/17 spike + 8/8 e2e browser run). tests/ .lintr-excluded → lint-exempt; R/ roxygen → document() N/; test-infra → CHANGELOG , NEWS. what: Learning 39 — Input-family run-and-observe conversion (8e-2 part A, continued): the innerText VISIBILITY-MAP drives static-pattern choice; a tautology can encode a FALSE premise (assert pane-active, don’t fabricate a feature); the active nested-tab guidance HTML is the fallback anchor when a sidebar control is conditionally hidden (S39, Phase 8e-2 Input family / issue #40)
title: nprcgenekeepr — Project-Specific Learnings
text: Converted 3 Input-family E2E files (input-module 5 / input-detailed 6 / input-tutorial 8 = 19 browser-booting blocks) content-blind navigate_to_tab → grepl(get_html_safe(app,"body")) idiom assert_active_pane(app,"Input",<static>). class #38 — PURE [refactor-] run--observe (defect; Input pane already renders navigate_to_tab("Input") already targets right tab — “Input” tabPanel title, appUI.R:120-124), gated PRE-RED→run--observe [author-decision]; [mutation-check] supplies rigor (synthetic RED). () innerText VISIBILITY-MAP load-bearing tool choosing static pattern — extends #38b (“innerText carries every static label”) crucial corollary: innerText honors CSS display:none, within active Input pane reliably-visible text {sidebar controls inside false conditionalPanel} ∪ {ACTIVE nested-tab content} ∪ {nested-tab NAV labels}. HIDDEN → unusable: Separator radio “Comma/Semicolon/Tab” (conditionalPanel condition input.fileType=='fileTypeText' FALSE — fileType defaults fileTypeExcel, modInput.R:55-85), 3 non-default fileInputs, every non-active nested tab’s content (“Download Errors/Warnings/Cleaned Data” buttons + DTOutputs). “supports comma/tab-separated” assert hidden “Comma”/“Tab” labels → drew anchors always-rendered guidance instead (see (c)). Read module UI DEFAULT input state (radios/conditionalPanels selected) picking pattern; browser run [verify-first] check (hidden-subtree pattern → assert_active_pane=FALSE → caught immediately). (b) tautology test can encode FALSE premise — convert honestly, never force match. input-detailed “example data option” expect_true(TRUE) dead grepl("example|demo|sample|test"); module example/demo-data feature (“examples” text incidental — “name used examples output” format docs). Asserting string manufacture false coverage. honest conversion NULL-pattern assert_active_pane(app,"Input") — proves navigation actually landed + made visible Input pane (genuine upgrade expect_true(TRUE)) WITHOUT claiming nonexistent feature; flagged name/feature mismatch handoff. Contrast input-tutorial “genotype file support” (also tautology) real backing — File Content radio “Pedigree(s) genotypes …” (modInput.R:67-70) + Genotype-format docs → real pattern "genotype". Rule: classify tautology whether NAMED feature ACTUALLY EXISTS — real → assert ; nonexistent → NULL-pattern pane-active + flag, never force-match incidental text. (c) active nested-tab guidance HTML fallback static anchor sidebar control conditionally hidden. Input pane’s first/default nested tab “Input Format” renders includeHTML(input_format.html) (modInput.R:142-157), full text innerText — supplied CSV/comma/tab/format anchors conditionally-hidden Separator panel (“comma-delimited”, “tab-delimited”). sidebar can’t anchor pattern (relevant control sits false conditionalPanel), reach always-rendered guidance ACTIVE nested tab — confirm active nested tab (non-default nested tab display:none ). (d) Phase-3E / scope: test-tree-→ browser run (19 blocks / 19 expectations — 1:1 swap, net 0) + live mutation-check spike runtime (#31 pattern); drove real app. [mutation-check] PASS arms — correct (Input,"Data Input Quality Control")→TRUE, wrong-pane (Age-Sex Pyramid,…)→FALSE, wrong-content (Input,"Color Scheme")→FALSE (“Color Scheme” Pyramid-, sourced READING modPyramid.R per #38b guessing), old whole-body grepl("Color Scheme",body)→TRUE (content-blind contrast), active-pane innerText grepl→FALSE (sanity). [regression-read] held S38 baseline EXACTLY (2122 passed / 0 failed / 0 error, 159 e2e-skipped, 5 pre-existing modPyramid warnings, 0 non-e2e offenders). tests/ .lintr-excluded; R/ change → document()/NEWS ([news-vs-changelog] → CHANGELOG ). Commit 3 test files + docs via explicit git add ([macos-dupe-scan] — .DS_Store/..Rcheck//audit-html must ride along); /tmp/mutation_check_8e2_input.R committed. 8e-2 now ~half done (home-nav+app S38 + Input S39); PEDIGREE family (module/detailed/tutorial = 19) PYRAMID family (module/detailed = 12) remain SEPARATE sessions (plan R3 / FM #18/#25). Reflexes: [refactor-][author-decision][mutation-check][verify-first][regression-read][phase-3E-smoke][news-vs-changelog][macos-dupe-scan]. Apply: active-pane conversion, choose static pattern innerText VISIBILITY-MAP — default-visible sidebar controls + ACTIVE nested-tab content + nested-tab nav labels present; conditionalPanels false condition non-active nested tabs display:none unusable (read module UI DEFAULT state; browser run [verify-first]). Convert tautology whether named feature EXISTS — real → assert ; nonexistent → NULL-pattern assert_active_pane(app,"<Tab>") + flag, never force-match incidental text. sidebar control conditionally hidden, anchor always-rendered guidance HTML active nested tab.

what: Learning 40 — Pedigree-family run-and-observe conversion (8e-2 part B): the genuine-grepl-vs-tautology conversion split, the genuine-to-NULL data-dependent sub-case, and a PRE-GATE adversarial refutation of the whole map (S40, Phase 8e-2 Pedigree family / issue #40)
title: nprcgenekeepr — Project-Specific Learnings
text: Converted 3 Pedigree-family E2E files (pedigree-module 5 / pedigree-detailed 6 / pedigree-tutorial 8 = 19 browser-booting blocks) content-blind navigate_to_tab → grepl(get_html_safe(app,"body")) idiom assert_active_pane(app,"Pedigree Browser",<pattern>). class #38/#39 — PURE [refactor-] run--observe (defect; Pedigree pane already renders, “Pedigree Browser” tabPanel title appUI.R:130, navigate_to_tab’s 3rd fallback arg explicit documented -OP helper-shinytest2.R:245-250 — re-verified firsthand, wrong-tab defect), gated PRE-RED→run--observe [author-decision]; [mutation-check] supplies rigor (synthetic RED). () conversion PRINCIPLED SPLIT OLD assertion’s kind, uniform rewrite. Two classes need different treatment: genuine expect_true(grepl(orig, html)) assert already encodes real intent → KEEP original regex verbatim rescope haystack active pane (faithful refactor: pattern, tighter scope — module L6/L25/L42/L76, detailed L6/L25/L82, dragons); expect_true(TRUE) tautology (dead has_* <- grepl(...)) behavior preserve → free choose PRECISE default-visible anchor named control (“Display Unknown IDs”/“Focal Animals”/“Choose CSV file”/“Trim pedigree”/“Update Focal Animals”/“Clear Focal Animals”, modPedigree.R:52,72,79,86,105,118). Don’t uniformly substitute precise anchors (loses faithfulness genuine asserts) uniformly keep-regex (dead tautology regexes never asserted — precise anchor strictly honest discriminating). (b) GENUINE assert can ALSO become NULL — data-dependent sub-case, distinct #39’s nonexistent-feature NULL. #39’s honest-tautology rule NULLs tautology whose named feature doesn’t exist. real expect_true(grepl("table|dataTable", html)) assert (module L59, detailed L63) must ALSO convert NULL-pattern assert_active_pane(app,"Pedigree Browser") — table fake, data-dependent: DT::DTOutput(ns("pedigreeTable")) gated req(pedigreeData()) (modPedigree.R:150,306) tests load studbook, table renders EMPTY div innerText. original regex matched “table” appears elsewhere whole-body DOM (CSS/JS/pedigreeTable id ATTRIBUTE) — exactly content-blindness conversion closes. test “keep regex” whether least one alternative DEFAULT-VISIBLE pane innerText; NONE (target data-bearing), drop NULL + flag content assertion deferred 8e-6 (destination #39’s data-bearing deferral; DataTables “Show X entries” pagination, tutorial L28, data-dependent case). Result: 4 honest NULLs (module L59, detailed L63, detailed L101 [nonexistent “status filter”], tutorial L28), 15 content patterns; NULL assert_active_pane still genuinely upgrades old expect_true(TRUE)/content-blind grepl (catches wrong-tab / silent--op nav). (c) always-rendered LEFT-panel guidance HTML carries dragon column-keywords — extends #39(c) active-nested-tab guidance unconditional left panel. dragons (pedigree-detailed:57 sire|dam|parent|offspring|ancestor|descendant, pedigree-tutorial:174 sire|dam|sex|birth|exit|age|gen|population) resolve inst/extdata/ui_guidance/pedigree_browser.html (includeHTML modPedigree.R:41-44), lists “Ego ID, Sire ID, Dam ID, Sex, Generation, Population columns… Birth Date, Exit Date, Age”. Unlike #39’s Input case (anchor lived ACTIVE nested tab, nested-tab state mattered), modPedigree nested tabsetPanel — guidance column unconditionally visible, column names reliable static anchors. (Honesty self-correction: draft cited helpText “ancestors focal animals”; actual modPedigree.R:124-127 text “relatives focal animals” — critic caught misquote; verdict unaffected since guidance “Sire ID, Dam ID” independently satisfies sire|dam.) (d) PRE-GATE adversarial refutation WHOLE map — verify conversion committing owner gate, . Rather pose gate self-authored map discover bad pattern (slow, 19-Chrome-boot) browser run, ran 4-agent workflow (3 per-file skeptics told default--refuted + cross-checking critic) 19 proposed patterns AskUserQuestion: 0/19 refuted, critic GO, every pattern confirmed default-visible, 4 NULLs confirmed honest (overlooked static anchor), [mutation-check] labels “Color Scheme”/“Bin Size” confirmed FOREIGN (grep: modPyramid.R:31-32). [right-sized-orchestration] applied conversion slice (MEDIUM-risk 19-block multi-file map earns read-refutation sweep; browser run remains authoritative [verify-first]) [completeness-workflow] (critic hunts overlooked honest anchor make NULL dishonest). Cheap relative wasted browser cycle; owner gate carried verified map. (e) Phase-3E / scope: test-tree-→ browser run (19 blocks / 19 expectations — 1:1 swap, net 0) + live mutation-check spike runtime (#31 pattern); drove real app. [regression-read] non-e2e 2162 passed / 0 failed / 0 error / 0 non-e2e offenders (156 skipped, 5 pre-existing modPyramid warnings) — e2e-change self-skips create_test_app() (helper-shinytest2.R:196) non-e2e counts definitionally unaffected (count differs S39’s reported 2122 invocation set NOT_CRAN=true, surfacing non-e2e tests — orthogonal change, regression). tests/ .lintr-excluded; R/ change → document()/NEWS ([news-vs-changelog] → CHANGELOG ). Commit 3 test files + docs via explicit git add ([macos-dupe-scan] — .DS_Store/..Rcheck//audit-html must ride along); /tmp/mutation_check_8e2_pedigree.R committed. 8e-2 now ~3/4 done (home-nav+app S38 + Input S39 + Pedigree S40); PYRAMID family (pyramid-module/pyramid-detailed = 12) last 8e-2 cut, SEPARATE session (plan R3 / FM #18/#25). what: Learning 41 — Pyramid-family run-and-observe conversion (8e-2 part C, FINAL → 8e-2 COMPLETE): the NULL test is “does ≥1 regex alternative match DEFAULT-VISIBLE innerText?” NOT “is the named feature real / data-dependent?” (refines #40b); keep a genuine regex VERBATIM even when the test NAME overclaims; and the pre-gate refutation EARNED its keep by correcting 2/12 self-authored over-NULLs (S41, Phase 8e-2 Pyramid family / issue #40)
title: nprcgenekeepr — Project-Specific Learnings
text: Converted 2 Pyramid-family E2E files (pyramid-module 6 / pyramid-detailed 6 = 12 browser-booting blocks) content-blind navigate_to_tab → grepl(get_html_safe(app,"body")) idiom assert_active_pane(app,"Age-Sex Pyramid",<pattern>), LAST 8e-2 cut. class #38/#39/#40 — PURE [refactor-] run--observe (defect; Pyramid pane already renders, “Age-Sex Pyramid” tabPanel title appUI.R:139, navigate_to_tab’s 3rd fallback arg documented -op helper-shinytest2.R:250), gated PRE-RED→run--observe [author-decision]; [mutation-check] supplies rigor (synthetic RED). Outcome: 10 keep-regex (module L6/L25/L42/L59/L76/L93; detailed L6/L25[🐉]/L44[🐉]/L80), 2 tautology→anchor (detailed L63 expect_true(TRUE)→“Download Plot”; detailed L99 nchar(html)>100→“Age Plot”), 0 NULL. () NULL test purely “≥1 regex alternative match DEFAULT-VISIBLE innerText?” — “test’s NAMED target exist / data-dependent?” — refining #40b. FIRST map -NULLed D3 (“maximum age setting”) D6 (“data requirement message”) reasoning test’s NAMED intent (max-age control exists; empty-vs-loaded state data-dependent). Wrong altitude: conversion HAYSTACK-RESCOPE, question whether kept/anchored pattern matches something DEFAULT-VISIBLE pane. D3’s genuine regex max|maximum|age|limit matches always-visible age labels (“Age Unit:”, “Age Label Size:”, h3 “Age-Sex Pyramid Analysis”) — max=10/1500/2.0 tokens numeric widget BOUNDS (innerText), ’s max-age control, “age” visible → KEEP (rescope), NULL. #40b’s “genuine→NULL” fires alternative default-visible (req()-gated DTOutput whose “table” hit DOM id attribute); triggered nonexistent/overclaiming NAME regex still matches incidental--visible static text. (b) Keep genuine regex VERBATIM even test NAME overclaims; flag dragon comment — rename/retarget. D3 stays max|maximum|age|limit (critic’s “rescope /age|bin|unit|label/ + rename test” regex+name change = scope creep beyond haystack-rescope slice). Faithfulness = pattern, tighter scope; overclaiming name pre-existing slice’s defect fix. code comment records match via static “age” labels, real max-age control. (c) content-LENGTH tautology (nchar>100, regex keep) whose pane always-rendered guidance panel gets GUIDANCE ANCHOR, NULL+defer. D6’s test names “placeholder instruction shown without data” — unconditional includeHTML(pyramidPlot.html) (“Pedigree Age Plot plots age-distribution live animals…”, modPyramid.R:55-58) instruction, always visible pre-data → anchor “Age Plot” (distinct D5’s population|distribution|pyramid|demographic). NULL+defer--8e-6 -conservative: empty-state MESSAGE static, rendered PLOT data-dependent — block targets plot. Extends #39(c)/#40(c) (guidance--anchor) FALLBACK case: content-length tautology surviving regex still gets real anchor pane carries unconditional guidance. (d) pre-gate refutation EARNED KEEP session CORRECTING map (2/12 refuted), merely confirming (S40 0/19). refuted blocks -NULLs ()/(c); skeptics+critic, reasoning source, caught AskUserQuestion gate slow 12-Chrome-boot browser run. Adopting corrections produced 0-NULL map. payoff case [right-sized-orchestration]/[completeness-workflow] PRE-GATE: author’s first map wrong, read-adversarial sweep cheap insurance converts private misjudgment corrected, owner-gateable map — value exactly highest refutedCount>0. (Verify critic firsthand — CONFIRMS; source-grounded reasoning independently checked modPyramid.R + guidance HTML adopting.) (e) 0-NULL outcome contradicted S40 handoff’s anticipation data-dependent plotOutput force NULLs/defers pyramid family. didn’t: none 12 blocks asserts rendered plot/Statistics table — every block targets static sidebar control, nav/tab label, h3, unconditional guidance — pyramid pane’s rich static surface yields real content anchor 12. handoff’s per-block anticipation hint, spec (FM #6/#20 applied handoff): census actual blocks firsthand. (f) Phase-3E / scope: test-tree-→ browser run (12 blocks / 12 expectations — 1:1 swap, net 0) + live mutation-check spike runtime (#31 pattern); drove real app. [mutation-check] PASS, INVERTED vs Pedigree slice (Pyramid now TARGET pane) — correct (Age-Sex Pyramid,"Bin Size")→TRUE, wrong-pane (Pedigree Browser,"Bin Size")→FALSE, wrong-content (Age-Sex Pyramid,"Focal Animals")→FALSE (“Focal Animals” Pedigree-modPedigree.R:52, grep-confirmed foreign Pyramid; “Bin Size” Pyramid-modPyramid.R:31), old whole-body grepl("Focal Animals",body)→TRUE (content-blind contrast), active-pane innerText grepl→FALSE (sanity). [regression-read] non-e2e 2162 passed / 0 failed / 0 error / 0 non-e2e offenders (156 skipped, 5 pre-existing modPyramid warnings) — S40 baseline held EXACTLY; e2e-change self-skips create_test_app() (helper-shinytest2.R:196). tests/ .lintr-excluded; R/ change → document()/NEWS ([news-vs-changelog] → CHANGELOG ). Commit 2 test files + docs via explicit git add ([macos-dupe-scan] — .DS_Store/..Rcheck//audit-html must ride along); /tmp/mutation_check_8e2_pyramid.R committed. 8e-2 now COMPLETE (home-nav+app S38 + Input S39 + Pedigree S40 + Pyramid S41); next 8e-3 (genetic-value / breeding-groups / menu / workflow), SEPARATE session.
